fields.label: Source System
fields.description: Optional label for the sender e.g. ERPNext, Shopify. Used for routing when same event comes from multiple sources.

fields.label: Event Key Field
fields.description: Which field in the incoming payload to read as the event type. Default: event

fields.label: Event Value
fields.description: The value to match e.g. order_confirmed, delivery_completed, followup_batch

fields.label: Target Agent
fields.description: Specific agent to handle tasks from this route

fields.label: Target Group
fields.description: Agent group to distribute tasks across (used if Target Agent is not set)

fields.label: Dispatch Mode
fields.description: Immediate: dispatch one task right now. Batch: payload contains an array of records to run as a batch.

fields.label: Batch Records Field
fields.description: For Batch mode: name of the field in the payload that contains the array of records e.g. records

fields.label: Batch Label
fields.description: Optional human-readable label for auto-generated batches from this route. e.g. 'Monday Followup'

fields.label: Sample Webhook JSON
fields.description: Paste a sample webhook payload here to automatically populate field mapping source fields.

fields.label: Field Mappings
fields.description: Map fields from incoming payload to context JSON. Leave empty to pass full raw payload as context.

fields.label: Allowed Tools
fields.description: Select the MCP tools this agent/campaign is allowed to call during the conversation.

fields.label: Idempotency Key Field
fields.description: Payload field to use as idempotency key (prevents duplicate tasks). e.g. order_id

fields.label: Callback URL
fields.description: URL to POST status updates when tasks complete

fields.label: Webhook Secret Key
fields.description: Optional. If set, incoming requests must include matching X-Webhook-Secret header. Leave blank to allow unauthenticated webhooks.
